JUDGE BALLATI, GGOROSIN, CLERK, LNAJERA, REPORTER. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFTS. WITNESS SWORN & EXAMINED, EXHIBIT INTRODUCED & ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT, TERMS ON THE RECORD. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT, EXHIBIT W/DRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, ALETHEA RUTHERFORD, SEAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 77 LAPIDGE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110 $2,190.00 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,270.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
